texto: He's a gazillionaire. I barely make expenses every month. He owns mansions all over the world
autor: I co-rent a townhouse in Alexandria with my best friend. Women fall all over themselves to go out with him. I haven't had a date since forever.
explicacao: Citação de I co-rent a townhouse in Alexandria with my best friend. Women fall all over themselves to go out with him. I haven't had a date since forever. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “He's a gazillionaire. I barely make expenses every month. He owns mansions all over the world” articula reflexao, magda-alexander, storm-damages em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e storm-damages.
